title: Identifier
description: A unique identifier and optionally it's scheme and other relevant information

schemaAgency.title: schema agency
schemaAgency.description: The name of the agency that issued the identifier

creator.title: creator
creator.description: the agency that manages the identifier scheme

issued.title: issued
issued.description: The date of formal issuance (e.g., publication) of the Identifier

anyOf.description: A year and month in YYYY-MM format

notation.title: notation
notation.description: abbreviation or code from code lists for an identifier

_oldDocs.rationale: Incorporating adms:Identifier in the DCAT-US profile fosters a culture of data governance and trust by transparently documenting the authority behind each identifier. This enhances data reliability and credibility, boosting confidence for DCAT-US users. Additionally, it enables versatile data access using multiple identifiers, enhancing overall data accessibility and usability for diverse stakeholders.
